thesis: PRE-MARKET window (07:30-ET slot) — the next-session plan for TODAY's regular session, snapshot.nextSessionDate = 2026-07-23, authored BEFORE the open on the deterministic snapshot asOf 2026-07-23T11:18:21.890Z (~07:18 ET Thursday 7/23, marketClosed=false, 285 cached series). HONEST LABELING + WHAT CHANGED: the date has now ROLLED to 7/23, so the 7/22 session is now a CONFIRMED SETTLED daily close — an upgrade from the prior after-hours run, where the same values were still a late live intraday tick. SPY's held 50-day is therefore now confirmed on a settled bar, not an intraday read. STRUCTURE FIRST: the extended tech-led structural bull is still DIGESTING near all-time highs and the index/leadership split PERSISTS into the new session; the settled 7/22 close reads essentially where the after-hours tick left it, so the frame is unchanged — held index, unbroadened leadership — while overnight vol firmed. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars: ~10 (7/09->7/22) — 7 directly confirmed (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17) plus 7/20/7/21/7/22 now settled via the date-roll chain in recentHistory (sessions 7/21 and 7/22 rolled, and the snapshot has now advanced to nextSessionDate 7/23, confirming 7/22 settled); today 7/23 has NOT opened — its bar is not formed and NOT counted, and intraday reruns are not counted. ROTATION: the owning sector RRG refreshed THIS run (asOf 2026-07-23T11:18:21Z) reads 'Rotate toward XLRE as XLV weakens'. Anti-whipsaw: treat this as one Leading rate-sensitive + energy 'into' cluster funded from weakening healthcare rather than chasing a single flipped name — XLRE Leading (rsRatio 100.38>100, accel +1.5, into, +7.39% over its 200-day) AND XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.78>100, rsMom 102.11 board-best, accel +1.12, into, +15.0% over its 200-day, commodity-confirmed: carried real-assets PDBC 69.7 Uptrend, commodity breadth 75) are BOTH the leading 'into' names, versus XLV Weakening (rsMom 98.23, accel -2.72, out) and XLI Weakening (out); XLK is Basing up (rsMom 99.78<100, accel +0.51) — no longer a clean 'into'. TACTICAL, last: monthly OPEX (7/17) is RESOLVED and dealer gamma has RESET — prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, the pin/magnet, option-implied open moves, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing any gamma trade, vol-term claim, or Fed positioning. PLAN at the open: HOLD the bull-stack and do NOT chase index beta into ATH resistance while QQQ is tangled below its 50-day and SPMO sits right under its own (SPY's reclaim still needs QQQ to confirm the broadening); ROTATE toward the confirmed Leading rate-sensitive/energy 'into' cluster (XLRE per this run, XLE the commodity-confirmed board-best) over weakening XLV; TRIM stretched, still internally-thin semis into any open strength; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT still below its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail — a still-low VIX (17.67, firmed but calm) keeps it cheap, not less necessary — after re-verifying the live path; stay OUT of precious-metal havens (GLD 17.4 washed / SLV 0).
